import React from 'react'; import { FaVideo, FaPhone, FaTimes } from 'react-icons/fa'; const CallTypeModal = ({ isOpen, onClose, doctor, onSelectCallType }) => { if (!isOpen) return null; return (
{/* Header */}

Choose Consultation Type

{/* Doctor Info */}
{doctor?.name ? doctor.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('') : 'DR'}

{doctor?.name || 'Doctor'}

{doctor?.specialty || 'Medical Specialist'}

{doctor?.experience_years || 0} years experience

{/* Call Type Options */}

How would you like to consult with {doctor?.name?.split(' ')[1] || 'the doctor'}?

{/* Video Call Option */} {/* Audio Call Option */}
{/* Footer */}
Consultation Fee: ₹{doctor?.consultation_fee || 0}
); }; export default CallTypeModal;
